raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"code_behavior","confidence":0.95,"matched_text":"This code creates a candlestick chart with a range slider that allows the user to select the time range to display.","distilled_fact":"The code creates a candlestick chart with a range slider that allows the user to select the time range to display."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"code_behavior","confidence":0.95,"matched_text":"The user can click on the chart to set an alarm and display a draggable red line.","distilled_fact":"The user can click on the chart to set an alarm and display a draggable red line."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"code_behavior","confidence":0.95,"matched_text":"If the line is within the y-range of the chart (i.e. within the minimum and maximum prices), an alarm message is displayed.","distilled_fact":"If the line is within the y-range of the chart, an alarm message is displayed."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"code_behavior","confidence":0.94,"matched_text":"Otherwise, the message is hidden.","distilled_fact":"Otherwise, the alarm message is hidden."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"code_behavior","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"You can adjust the appearance of the chart and the alarm message by modifying the options passed to the `go.Candlestick()` and `html.Div()` functions.","distilled_fact":"The appearance of the chart and the alarm message can be adjusted by modifying the options passed to the `go.Candlestick()` and `html.Div()` functions."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"code_behavior","confidence":0.88,"matched_text":"For example, you can change the colors used for the up and down candlesticks, the color and style of the draggable line, and more.","distilled_fact":"The colors used for the up and down candlesticks, the color and style of the draggable line, and more can be changed."}]}
